meta.note: Radiator wattage calculation: Q = heat_transfer_coefficient * surface_area * (flow_temperature - indoor_temperature). Surface area is the total radiator surface area (panels + convectors).

radiators.name: Type 1 (Single panel)
radiators.description: Basic single panel radiator without convectors. Suitable for low heat output requirements.

radiators.name: Type 11 (Single panel, single convector)
radiators.description: Single panel with single convector fins for improved heat transfer.

radiators.name: Type 22 (Double panel, double convector)
radiators.description: Double panel with double convector fins for high heat output. Common in modern installations.

radiators.name: Type 33 (Triple panel, triple convector)
radiators.description: Triple panel with triple convector fins for maximum heat output in cold climates.
